EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IObjectCopy

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members to copy objects by value. The object must support IPersistStream to be copied.

[Guid("9C3673EA-BC0A-11D5-A9DF-00104BB6FC1C")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IObjectCopy

Methods

Copy(object)

Obtains a new object which is a copy of the input object.

object Copy(object pInObject)

Parameters

pInObject object

Returns

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

Overwrite(object, ref object)

Overwrites the object with the contents of input object.

void Overwrite(object pInObject, ref object pOverwriteObject)

Parameters

pInObject object
pOverwriteObject object

Examples
